meaning: n.小圆面包,曲卷(或结)壮的头发
examples: Ty asks how to defrost a hot dog bun.
She wore her hair in a bun.
Her hair was tied severely in a bun.
The stalls were mysteriously serving beef, not pork, placed between two halves of a round bun.
Bun-sgoil Ghaidhlig Inbhir Nis has a role of 169 primary school pupils and 94 nursery pupils.
